final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial sports photograph of a muscular athlete performing a deadlift in a professional gym (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "阳刚之气" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Gregory Heisler's athletic portraiture (1980s–2000s American sports photography), 1990s industrial fitness editorial print culture, Leni Riefenstahl's sculptural body-form visual language; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a muscular athlete with clearly defined muscle lines performing a deadlift, with visible sweat on skin
Scene/backdrop: must include a professional gym with industrial-style interior decor
Lighting/mood: needs a cold-toned, high-contrast atmosphere emphasizing raw power and physical beauty — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool / cold direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs an industrial surface treatment (exposed metal, concrete, raw gym equipment) — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
